messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
If the prior worker verdict is source-plausible but the gate failed only proof, source-term, section, or word-band checks, preserve that verdict and repair the failed fields. Do not invert the verdict unless the source boundary itself is wrong.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

action.description: May facilities allow contractor site work to begin?

context.action_boundary: May facilities allow contractor site work to begin?
context.anomaly_observed: A generic insurance warning remains visible; work start requires abstract insurance-status class.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Work start WORK-IRI-089 begins for Iris Installers at Site 4Q on 2026-06-28 requiring umbrella liability.
Insurance warning WARN-IRI-089 says some COI records are stale and insurance status must be separately verified.
Endorsement END-IRI-089 covers Iris Installers, Site 4Q, umbrella liability, currently bound carrier endorsement CE-12, effective before work begins.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Contractor site start is complete only when endorsement authority matches contractor, site, coverage type, work start date, and insurance-status class before work begins.

turns_completed.output_summary: Gov local verdict None route CONTINUE_WORKER

Treating WARN-IRI-089 as advisory rather than operative open-blocker
Accepting abstract coverage reference without insurance-status class confirmation
Allowing any worker to issue ALLOW before status-class dependency resolves
